race_meta.race_name: CopyBet Daily Profit Boost Mares' Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed queen roslyn at position 2 (16.0% probability) vs top pick Holly Bird (34.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~18.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Holly Bird > Queen Roslyn, but actual result was Queen Roslyn > Out On Her Own. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Queen Roslyn had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.2%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
